prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.4 kg; Height 169.3 cm; BMI 24.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.1%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 202mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.3kg; 9 months ago 70.3kg; 6 months ago 67.9kg; 3 months ago 68.8kg; current 71.4kg), Height (12 months ago 169.3cm; 9 months ago 169.3cm; 6 months ago 169.3cm; 3 months ago 169.3cm; current 169.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 79U/L; current 85U/L), AST (12 months ago 109U/L; 9 months ago 117U/L; 6 months ago 116U/L; 3 months ago 109U/L; current 113U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 450mg/g; 9 months ago 329mg/g; 6 months ago 440mg/g; 3 months ago 308mg/g; current 289mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 123mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 127mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
